nasb.text: But we were hoping that it was He who was going to redeem Israel. Indeed, besides all this, it is the third day since these things happened.

esv.text: But we had hoped that he was the one to redeem Israel. Yes, and besides all this, it is now the third day since these things happened.

cnv.text: 但我們素來盼望要救贖以色列的就是他。不但這樣，這些事發生到今天，已經是第三天了。

ccb.text: “我们一直希望祂就是要拯救以色列的那位。还有，今天是事发后的第三天，

csbs.text: 不过我们一直希望他就是要救赎以色列的那一位。不但如此，从这些事发生到今天，已经是第三天了。
